view_of_disability: Disability is a health condition to be treated or cured
design_implication: Accommodation and assistive devices; can pathologize users
example: Prescription of a wheelchair or hearing aid

view_of_disability: Disability is caused by barriers (physical attitudinal digital) not by impairment
design_implication: Remove barriers in products and environments; universal design
example: Adding captions so a deaf user can access video

focus: Interaction of biology psychology and social context
view_of_disability: Disability results from interaction of body functions activities participation and environment
design_implication: Design must consider functional context and situational factors
example: Designing a form that works with low vision AND low bandwidth

view_of_disability: Accessibility is a human right; denial of access is discrimination
design_implication: Accessibility is mandatory not optional; legal compliance required
example: Government digital services meeting WCAG as law

view_of_disability: People with disabilities need help and protection (outdated)
design_implication: Often leads to paternalistic design; avoid
example: Marketing that portrays disabled users as inspirational victims

design_implication: Focus on assistive tech for employment; limited scope
example: Workplace screen readers paid by employer

view_of_disability: Disability is a valued identity and source of community
design_implication: Co-design with disabled users; inclusive language
example: Including Deaf culture voices in video calling features
